name: 会议间隙社交
description: 你在会议茶歇、海报区或 session 间隙和陌生学者交流。目标是自然自我介绍、找到共同兴趣、交换联系方式，并体面结束对话。

dialogues.title: 主动自我介绍
dialogues.context: 你在茶歇时看到一位读过论文的学者，想主动过去打招呼。

lines.speaker: you
lines.en: Hi, I hope you don't mind me introducing myself. I'm Wenbo, a PhD student working on education and family change.
lines.zh: 你好，希望我主动自我介绍不会太冒昧。我是Wenbo，博士生，研究教育和家庭变化。
highlights: I hope you don't mind me introducing myself

lines.speaker: professor
lines.en: Nice to meet you, Wenbo. What university are you at?

lines.speaker: you
lines.en: I'm at CUHK. I actually read your paper on cohort change last semester, and it was really helpful for my own project.
lines.zh: 我在港中文。我上学期读过你那篇关于队列变化的论文，对我自己的项目很有帮助。
highlights: really helpful for my own project

lines.speaker: professor
lines.en: That's very nice to hear. What are you working on now?

dialogues.title: 被别人搭话
dialogues.context: 有人听了你的报告后来找你聊天，你需要简洁介绍自己的项目并延续对话。

lines.speaker: colleague
lines.en: I really enjoyed your talk. The field-of-study result was fascinating.

lines.speaker: you
lines.en: Thank you, I really appreciate that. It's the part of the paper I'm most excited about right now.
lines.zh: 谢谢你，我很感谢。那也是我现在对这篇论文最兴奋的部分。

lines.speaker: colleague
lines.en: Are you planning to develop that mechanism further?

lines.speaker: you
lines.en: Yes, that's the plan. I'm hoping to connect it more explicitly to the literature on educational stratification.
lines.zh: 是的，我就是这么打算的。我希望把它更明确地连接到教育分层文献。

dialogues.title: 告别换人
dialogues.context: 你聊了几分钟，想礼貌结束对话并留下后续联系。

lines.speaker: you
lines.en: This has been really helpful. I don't want to take up too much of your break, but I'd love to stay in touch.
lines.zh: 这对我很有帮助。我不想占用你太多茶歇时间，不过我很希望之后保持联系。
highlights: I don't want to take up too much of your break
I'd love to stay in touch

lines.speaker: professor
lines.en: Of course. Feel free to send me an email.

lines.speaker: you
lines.en: Thank you, I will. It was really nice meeting you.
lines.zh: 谢谢，我会的。很高兴认识你。

lines.speaker: professor
lines.en: You too. Enjoy the rest of the conference.

universalExpressions.meaning: 自我介绍 + 说自己做什么

expressions.en: I hope you don't mind me introducing myself.
expressions.note: 主动搭话时很礼貌，降低唐突感

expressions.en: I'm a PhD student working on...
expressions.note: 最清楚地介绍身份和研究方向
比 working on 更正式，适合介绍研究主题

expressions.en: What are you working on these days?
expressions.note: 自然友好，适合茶歇闲聊

expressions.en: Are you presenting at this conference?
expressions.note: 会议场景破冰常用，容易延续话题

expressions.en: How does this project fit with your broader work?
expressions.note: 更深入，适合已经知道对方项目时

expressions.en: That connects closely to my own project.
expressions.note: 直接建立研究联系，适合继续聊

expressions.en: I've been thinking about a similar question.
expressions.note: 强调共同兴趣，但不抢对方话题

expressions.en: I see a lot of overlap with what I'm working on.
expressions.note: 适合为后续合作或邮件铺垫

expressions.en: Would it be okay if I followed up by email?
expressions.note: 礼貌请求后续联系，适合对方资历更高时

expressions.en: I'd be happy to send you the paper.
expressions.note: 主动提供材料，适合对方对你研究感兴趣时

expressions.en: Let me give you my email.
expressions.note: 更直接，适合双方已经聊得顺畅时

expressions.en: I don't want to take up too much of your break.
expressions.note: 礼貌退出，不显得突然结束

expressions.en: It was really nice meeting you.
expressions.note: 标准友好收尾，适合第一次见面

expressions.en: I'll let you get back to the conference.
expressions.note: 轻松结束，适合茶歇或走廊聊天

expressions.en: I'd love to stay in touch.
I'd be very interested in continuing this conversation.
expressions.note: 更正式，适合学术话题聊得深入时

expressions.en: Maybe we can compare notes after the conference.
expressions.note: 更轻松，适合同辈或相近领域同事
